CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2020 Set For Trial On Jun-28-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Bay Area Lightworks, Inc.?S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages Allegations From First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-25-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BAY AREA LIGHTWORKS, INC.'S Motion To Strike Punitive Damages Allegations From First Amended Complaint (FAC) is denied. The FAC's allegations suffice at this early stage of the litigation. Counsel are encouraged to resolve their discovery differences.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the adopted ruling.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
